calibration.calibration_note: With hazard_harm=0.02, avg episode ~182 steps (was ~18 with 0.5). Actual episode time higher.

items.title: MECH-314 curiosity-conversion DOUBLE-GATED -- VALIDITY-FIXED re-test (equalise per-seed P1 committed-tick budget + replace the degenerate flat-hot temperature null with a valid same-layer magnitude-matched non-temperature null); test-design re-tune, supersedes V3-EXQ-706
items.note: VALIDITY-FIXED LETTER routed by the confirmed, user-gated failure_autopsy_V3-EXQ-706_2026-06-26 (.md+.json; hold/reconsider -> 706b). Scientific question UNCHANGED (does the MECH-314 curiosity channel convert to committed-action-class diversity under BOTH composed selection-face eligibility gates: MECH-448 demotion + MECH-449 Go/No-Go?); substrate already built (substrate action=none; MECH-449 built+validated 689g PASS). WHY 706 WAS NOT A VALID TERMINAL (autopsy): 706 self-routed its pre-registered TERMINAL label (conversion_ceiling_persists_despite_double_gating) with all 5 readiness legs met (GAP-A pool 0.077; demotion excluded 22.69; Go/No-Go suppressed 7.05) and lift-over-F-only 1/3 (CUR 1.013 ~ FONLY 0.970 ~ NOISE 0.970), but the TERMINAL label was CORRECTED to a validity re-test for TWO measurement-validity gaps -- (a) the matched-noise control was DEGENERATE: ARM_NOISE flat-hot temperature 2.5 was byte-identical to ARM_FONLY on all 3 seeds because committed-class entropy is temperature-decoupled by the F-bounded eligibility constitution (the 700-lineage MECH-313 lesson recurring on the curiosity test); and (b) severe per-seed P1-budget imbalance (~545 vs ~5400 ticks) so the one margin-passing seed (44, +0.121) was the noisiest while the two well-sampled seeds (42/43) were flat/negative. evidence_direction non_contributory SOUND; MECH-314 UNWEAKENED. THE TWO VALIDITY FIXES (the ONLY changes vs 706; everything else kept VERBATIM): FIX 1 -- equalise the per-seed P1 measurement budget via a per-cell COMMITTED-TICK budget (each cell runs P1 until it accumulates EXACTLY P1_COMMITTED_BUDGET=1000 past-window committed ticks, truncated, capped at P1_MAX_EPISODES=120) + readiness leg F (a short cell self-routes substrate_not_ready_requeue) so no under-sampled seed dominates the margin. FIX 2 -- replace the degenerate flat-hot temperature null with a VALID same-layer non-temperature null: ARM_NOISE (now T=1.0) injects, at the e3.select score_bias slot the curiosity channel feeds, a per-tick deterministic-random per-candidate bias whose cross-candidate RANGE is magnitude-matched BY CONSTRUCTION to the realised ARM_CURIOSITY curiosity range for that seed (arms run ARM_CURIOSITY first so each seed's realised range is measured), via an experiment-level wrapper around agent.e3.select (NO substrate change) -- avoids the 700c 41x / 704 176.9x overshoot -- + readiness leg G (a degenerate injected range, an out-of-band magnitude ratio, or committed-class counts byte-identical to ARM_FONLY self-routes substrate_not_ready_requeue, NEVER a false reading). KEPT VERBATIM from 706: double-gated design (use_f_eligibility_demotion + adaptive_floor 689e + use_go_nogo_constitution 689g + an active staleness/perseveration No-Go injected per tick), MECH-314 curiosity the SOLE modulatory channel, GAP-A e2_world_forward divergent pool, SD-056 online contrastive stack, harm-free SD-054 reef-bipartite, 3 arms (ARM_CURIOSITY w0.25 / ARM_FONLY w0 / ARM_NOISE same-layer matched null) x 3 seeds, phased P0/P1, committed-action-class entropy PRIMARY DV. PRE-REGISTERED TERMINAL (validity question): readiness MET (both gates active + per-seed budget balanced + the same-layer non-temperature null valid + magnitude-matched) AND no lift over the double-gated F-only + valid null => conversion_ceiling_persists_despite_double_gating_valid_null (non_contributory; PRE-REGISTERED TERMINAL -> V4 ARC-110 loop-segregation; this trips the brake-LOCK recorded in the 706 autopsy; NO more V3 letters on this lineage). readiness MET + lift => mech314_curiosity_converts_under_double_gating (supports). Any readiness leg short => substrate_not_ready_requeue + non_degenerate=False (scoring-excluded; NEVER a MECH-314 weakens). RE-DERIVE BRAKE: EXEMPT. The 706 autopsy stamped re_derive_brake.fired=false (not-yet-fair test, not a clean ceiling; same logic that exempted V3-EXQ-705 vs 705b) and recorded the brake-LOCK naming 706b as 'the one validity-fixed letter the lock permits'; the next VALID seed-balanced non-temperature-nulled no-lift FIRES the brake -> V4 ARC-110. claim_ids=[MECH-314]; experiment_purpose=evidence; PROMOTES NOTHING (MECH-314 candidate; pending_retest_after_substrate). recommended_substrate_queue_entry action=amend (additive v4_loop_segregation trajectory + add MECH-314 to unblocks_claims) is a GOVERNANCE write, not queue-experiment scope. ARM-REUSE: all cells emit per-cell arm_fingerprint (extra_ineligible_reason online_e2_training_stateful_per_cell -- online SD-056 e2 training is stateful within a cell; this is also a PRE-REGISTERED TERMINAL letter on a per-letter-in-flux conversion lineage, so no plausible same-config successor); REUSE_BASELINE_FROM=None. GATES: py_compile + ASCII-clean (0 non-ascii) + validate_experiments --strict --paths OK (per-cell arm_fingerprint; 0 readiness-warnings) + dry-run smoke exit 0 (self-routes substrate_not_ready_requeue at 1-seed toy scale = correct legF/legG non-vacuity; ARM_NOISE entropy 1.304 != ARM_FONLY 0.999 = the same-layer null is NON-degenerate, the 706 byte-identical-null fixed; noise_match_ratio 1.0; no manifest leaked under evidence/). phase3-queue dropped-file hazard: confirm git show HEAD contains this entry + queue_id present before push. CONCURRENT twin session queue-experiment-700d co-appends to this file (different queue_id/script) -- coordinate via pathspec + pull-before-push.

items.title: MECH-451 finer-channel-granularity validation falsifier -- LETTER iteration (ARM_NOISE magnitude matched to the REALISED A2 learned range at run time + substantive-dissociation near-vacuity guard); test-design re-tune, supersedes V3-EXQ-704
items.note: LETTER iteration routed by the confirmed, user-gated failure_autopsy_V3-EXQ-704_2026-06-25 (.md+.json). Scientific question UNCHANGED; substrate already built (substrate action = none). WHY 704 FAILED (precondition_unmet, NOT a falsification): the ARM_NOISE same-layer null injected a frozen random w_chan_finer at a FIXED absolute scale (FCG_NOISE_SCALE=0.5); A2's LEARNED finer-channel dissociation came in tiny (range ~0.00148, only ~15x the 1e-4 floor), so the fixed-scale null was ~176.9x the A2 LEARNED range -> fcg_noise_magnitude_matched ([0.25,4.0]x band) FAILED and the C1 'A2 strict-above ARM_NOISE' bar was meaningless. V3-EXQ-642 invalid-precondition family (control-calibration artifact); MECH-451 UNWEAKENED; re-derive brake NOT fired (1st MECH-451 autopsy; brake-exempt config re-tune). THE FIX (the ONE scientific change; everything else from 704 kept VERBATIM): (1) the ARM_NOISE frozen-random w_chan_finer range is now magnitude-matched AT RUN TIME to the REALISED per-(arm,seed) A2 LEARNED w_chan_finer range (FCG_NOISE_MATCH_TARGET_RATIO=1.0 = centre of the band). Arms run A0,A1,A2,ARM_NOISE in order, so each ARM_NOISE seed's A2 learned range is already measured and the injected deviation is rescaled so its range EQUALS the matched A2 range BY CONSTRUCTION -> the ratio lands in-band; a missing/degenerate A2 range falls back to FCG_NOISE_FALLBACK_SCALE=0.5, which correctly trips the magnitude-match precondition -> substrate_not_ready_requeue. (2) a SUBSTANTIVE-dissociation near-vacuity guard (autopsy Step 7): the A2 LEARNED finer-channel range must clear W_CHAN_FINER_SUBSTANTIVE_RANGE_FLOOR=5e-3 (well above the bare 1e-4 dissociability floor AND above 704's near-vacuous 0.00148) on a strict-majority of seeds; if the finer channels only barely clear the floor ('the compressed blend re-labelled'), the test self-routes substrate_not_ready_requeue + non_degenerate=False rather than a misleading no-lift weakens on a knife-edge tiny-structure-vs-tiny-matched-null comparison. KEPT VERBATIM from 704: same GAP-A reef-bipartite foraging substrate, same landed arithmetic envelope (use_f_eligibility_demotion + adaptive_floor 689e + go_nogo 689g + modulatory-authority/top_k k=3 569i) as a MATCHED CONSTANT on all arms, settling W_lat OFF on ALL arms, 4 arms (A0_ENVELOPE_ONLY / A1_GLOBAL_WCHAN / A2_FINER_CHANNELS / ARM_NOISE) x 6 seeds, phased P0/P1/P2 (250 ep/cell), committed-action-class entropy PRIMARY DV. PRE-REGISTERED decisive either way: A2 strict-above A0 AND A1 AND the now-correctly-matched verified-lifting noise bar => REPRESENTATIONAL COMPRESSION confirmed -> supports MECH-451 + PRE-EMPTS the V4 ARC-110 loop-segregation build; A2 finer-weights-MOVE but no lift beyond A1 => compression NOT the binding constraint -> POSITIVE evidence FOR ARC-110 (route to v4_loop_segregation), weakens MECH-451. claim_ids=[MECH-451]; experiment_purpose=evidence; PROMOTES NOTHING (MECH-451 candidate / substrate_conditional / v3); recommended substrate_queue action=none. ARM-REUSE: REUSE_BASELINE_FROM=None (runs all arms fresh; ARM_NOISE ineligible -- frozen-random injection; the false cache-miss is free). Gates: py_compile + ASCII-clean (0 non-ascii) + validate_experiments --strict --paths OK (per-cell arm_fingerprint; 0 readiness-warnings) + dry-run smoke exit 0 (substrate_not_ready_requeue at toy scale = correct non-vacuity self-route; runtime-match path executed; no manifest leaked under evidence/). phase3-queue dropped-file hazard: confirm git show HEAD contains this entry before push.
